title: Epicurium
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Epicurium''' was a cooking school located in [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]]. Famed throughout the galaxy, people from many different species would come from near and far to enroll. They would then learn about all the different schools of cooking, both from their instructors and from the massive amount of recipes available in the school's library. Many graduates of the Epicurium wound up working at [[Latli's]].<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
